Bob Dylan

Entertainment Centre, Sydney, New South Wales, Australia, September 4, 1998:

This is LB-2818.

Dylan Set:
dat > dolbyXLII cassette > cooledit200 > EQ+GE > CDWave > flac (taper SY)

02 I Threw It All Away 
03 Cold Irons Bound 
04 Just Like A Woman 
05 Can't Wait

08 Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic w band) 
09 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic w band) 
10 My Back Pages (acoustic w band) 
11 She Belongs To Me
